governance.mode: read-only scrape; no media generation; no stealth/bypass; no private patient/lead data
governance.clinical_claims: claims pass through Content OS compliance/Ana when clinical

intent_matrix.intent: Imagem premium geral, carrossel, banner, texto em imagem, design limpo
intent_matrix.content_os: Criativos estáticos, thumbnails, capas de carrossel, variações visuais com texto curto.
Mascotes, personagens recorrentes, avatar visual de campanha.
Só usar com identidade autorizada; útil para apresentadores/brand persona.

intent_matrix.command: higgsfield generate create cinematic_studio_soul_location --prompt "clínica premium, luz natural..." --aspect_ratio 16:9 --wait
intent_matrix.content_os: Bastidores sintéticos, cenários premium, ambientações de campanha.
Reels de autoridade, transições, vídeos curtos de conceito.

intent_matrix.intent: Image-to-video a partir de frame aprovado
intent_matrix.content_os: Animar capa/arte aprovada no Content OS.

intent_matrix.intent: Vídeo simples, plano único, custo menor
intent_matrix.content_os: Teste rápido quando Seedance for excesso.
Anúncios UGC, demonstração, product review. Usar hook/setting só nos modos compatíveis.
Stack de anúncios estáticos e variações de promessa/benefício.

intent_matrix.intent: Importar produto por URL para Marketing Studio
intent_matrix.content_os: Criar entidade reutilizável de produto/oferta antes de gerar ads.
Fotos premium de produto/kit/serviço visual, quando houver imagem base.
Cards de oferta, módulos A+, imagens de landing/comercial.
Gate pós-produção: hook, atenção, retenção e pontos fracos antes de publicar.
Opcional; generate create auto-uploada caminhos locais.

hooks.name: Product Hit
hooks.prompt: Object flies into frame, hits subject. Brief reaction → pivot to product.

hooks.name: Spicy
hooks.prompt: The shot starts with an extreme close-up of a collarbone, slowly tilts up to reveal a flawless makeup look, then pulls back into selfie framing before a silent pause leads into the product pitch.

hooks.name: Interview
hooks.prompt: Interviewer asks a second stranger a question based entirely on the first stranger's random answer; confusion builds until the second person naturally notices the product (Erewhon-style aspirational item) and pivots into a casual review.

hooks.name: Random Object Mic
hooks.prompt: During a casual vlog, a random absurd object falls into the person's hand from above, and they immediately use it as a microphone to continue a completely serious product review.

hooks.name: Product Crash
hooks.prompt: The product itself falls from above and destroyed, creating chaos; harsh sharpness leads to a perfectly clean and restored scene where a person calmly begins reviewing the product.

hooks.name: Blizzard
hooks.prompt: A cozy indoor scene is suddenly hit by a violent, impossible blizzard; chaos fills the room but the product remains intact and functioning, and once the storm stops, the product is still working.

hooks.name: Camera Bump
hooks.prompt: The camera operator accidentally bumps into a person, hitting their forehead; they react briefly, recover, and naturally reveal the dress (or product on it) while transitioning into a casual explanation.

hooks.name: Product Dodge
hooks.prompt: Suddenly, a product flies into a person's face; he quickly bends down to avoid a collision, and in the next frame he stands up straight and already holds the product in his hands and begins to review as if nothing had happened.

hooks.name: Epic Fail
hooks.prompt: A person performs an unsuccessful backflip, lands unsuccessfully, falls, and immediately, without pause, takes out the product and begins an unflappable review.

settings.name: Bedroom
settings.prompt: On bed or propped against pillows, soft window light. Unmade bed, cozy textures. Relaxed morning or evening wind-down vibe — honest, low-effort feel.

settings.name: Airplane Wing
settings.prompt: Person sits on airplane wing mid-flight at altitude. Casual product review — powerful wind, clouds, engine roar.

settings.name: Nature
settings.prompt: Outdoors — trail, park, beach, or garden depending on product. Natural light, greenery or open sky. Active or peaceful mood — setting adapts to product.

settings.name: Roofing
settings.prompt: Person on the edge of a skyscraper rooftop, city skyline stretched out behind, wind moving through hair, sun catching the buildings. Casual product review with the entire city below, character completely unbothered by the height — selfie camera, golden hour or dusk, urban scale visible in every direction.

settings.name: Gym
settings.prompt: Gym floor, locker room, or post-workout bench. Bright overhead lighting, equipment in background. Sweaty or freshly finished energy — product tied to performance or recovery.

settings.name: Volcano Rim
settings.prompt: Person sits on active volcano rim, lava below. Casual product review — lava bubbles, smoke drifts through, zero reaction.

settings.name: Bathroom
settings.prompt: Mirror selfie or front camera in bathroom. Ring light or vanity lighting, tiles visible. Intimate getting-ready energy — product shown mid-routine, close-up friendly.

settings.name: Tiny Reviewer
settings.prompt: Person shrunk to 15cm next to a product their full height. Normal selfie review at impossible scale — leans on it.

settings.name: Kitchen
settings.prompt: Standing at counter or leaning on island, natural daylight. Clean surface, mug or fruit in background. Casual mid-day energy — product fits daily routine.

settings.name: Car Roof
settings.prompt: Person on roof of moving car, desert highway, golden hour. Product review while swaying with the road. Semi truck passes — no flinch.

settings.name: In Car
settings.prompt: Selfie from passenger or driver seat, parked or cruising. Window light on face. Casual tone — talking to camera between errands.

settings.name: Street
settings.prompt: Walking on sidewalk or standing on urban street, handheld selfie. City backdrop — storefronts, traffic, pedestrians. Energetic pace, talking while moving. Spontaneous discovery feel.

settings.name: Office
settings.prompt: Desk setup, laptop open, coffee nearby. Clean modern space, soft overhead or monitor glow. Hushed mid-workday tone — quick product mention squeezed between tasks.

settings.name: Train Surf
settings.prompt: Person hangs outside a moving train, filming selfie.  Reviews product — wind pressing on them is the live demo.

João: Criar variações visuais/reels/ads via Content OS
Usar Virality Predictor antes de escala
Nunca publicar automaticamente; entregar URL/asset para aprovação
Jarvis: Pode consultar este mapa e orquestrar qual skill/fluxo chamar
Deve carregar ivs-data-dev-os antes de desenvolvimento ou integração Content OS
Maria: Governar uso, custos e compliance; pedir aprovação para publicação externa ou uso de rosto real
Ana: Revisar claims clínicos antes de conteúdo médico promissor; Higgsfield não decide compliance clínico
Clara: Não usar para atendimento direto; pode receber assets já aprovados via fluxos internos, sem envio automático
